models.name: activities
models.description: Learning activities and courses catalog table containing compliance training courses, course metadata, duration, difficulty levels, compliance categorization, and training management information. Purpose: Master catalog of all learning activities and training courses used for training enrollment, completion tracking, and compliance training identification. Essential for identifying compliance training courses (is_compliance flag), filtering training by compliance category (Data Privacy, Anti-Bribery, etc.), determining training requirements, and managing course catalog. Used in queries to find compliance training courses, to identify mandatory training activities, to filter training by category or subject, to join with transcript for training completion analysis, and to determine which courses are required for compliance. Joins with transcript to track enrollments and completions, with users via transcript to identify which employees completed which courses, and serves as the reference for all training activity queries.

properties.description: Unique learning object identifier in UUID format (examples: e.g., 123a9421-d8df-414c-9d8f-d0a71385d119, 58913160-51ae-4ed5-9d18-bee643284434, 9954ad01-0648-4715-846e-5c93e87e5d66, etc.)
Name of the learning activity or course (examples: e.g., Data Privacy Fundamentals 2025, GDPR Compliance Training 2025, Personal Data Protection 2025, etc.)
Human-readable activity code for cataloging and reference (format: ABBREV-NNNN, e.g., DATPRIFUN-6463, GDPCOMTRA-9707, PERDATPRO-8879, etc.)
Type of learning delivery method. Observed values: Online Course (e.g., Online Course, e.g., Online Course, e.g., Online Course, e.g., Online Course, e.g., Online Course, e.g., Online Course)

This comprehensive online course covers Anti-Bribery and Corruption 2025. Participants will learn essential concepts and practical skills through interactive modules and assessments.

properties.kpis: [{"name": "Total Active Courses", "sql": "COUNT(*) WHERE is_active = 1"}, {"name": "Compliance Courses", "sql": "COUNT(*) WHERE is_compliance = 1"}, {"name": "Courses by Category", "sql": "COUNT(*) GROUP BY compliance_category"}, {"name": "Average Duration", "sql": "AVG(duration)"}]
properties.queryPatterns: ["Filter by compliance_category for compliance reporting", "Join with transcript to calculate completion rates", "Group by activity_type for catalog analysis"]
